title: schizoloma boivinii
intro: Schizoloma boivinii, also known as Scolymus boivinii, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae), native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Schizoloma boivinii include treating digestive issues, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
